use_cases: Interactive hero section background with mouse-reactive dot grid
Landing page visual effect that responds to user cursor movement
Decorative canvas element for SaaS and fintech product showcases
Interactive portfolio or creative tool landing pages with dynamic backgrounds
Modern web app splash screens with depth-creating particle effects
ai_summary: An interactive canvas component that renders a grid of responsive dots which morph and change size based on mouse proximity. The dots connect with lines when within threshold distance, creating an organic, flowing network effect. Perfect for hero sections, backgrounds, or decorative elements where subtle mouse interactivity adds engagement without overwhelming content.
